norway.name: Geirangerfjord
norway.description: A UNESCO-listed fjord famous for its stunning natural beauty and cascading waterfalls.

norway.name: Northern Lights
norway.description: The aurora borealis dancing across the Arctic sky in one of the world's best viewing spots.

norway.name: Bryggen Wharf
norway.description: A UNESCO World Heritage Site featuring colourful wooden houses along the old wharf.

norway.name: Preikestolen
norway.description: A massive cliff rising 604 metres above the Lysefjord, offering breathtaking views.

norway.name: Lofoten Islands
norway.description: An archipelago with dramatic peaks, calm fjords, and traditional red fishing cabins.

sweden.name: Gamla Stan
sweden.description: Stockholm's old town with cobblestone streets, medieval buildings, and royal palace.

sweden.name: ABBA Museum
sweden.description: An interactive museum dedicated to the legendary pop group ABBA on Djurgården island.

sweden.name: Vasa Museum
sweden.description: Home to the only preserved 17th-century warship in the world, the Vasa.

sweden.name: Gothenburg Archipelago
sweden.description: Thousands of islands perfect for kayaking, cycling, and enjoying Swedish seafood.

sweden.name: Ice Hotel
sweden.description: The world's first ice hotel, rebuilt each winter with unique art suites and ice sculptures.

finland.name: Helsinki Cathedral
finland.description: A striking neoclassical cathedral dominating the Senate Square in the capital.

finland.name: Santa Claus Village
finland.description: The official hometown of Santa Claus on the Arctic Circle, open year-round.

finland.name: Lakeland
finland.description: One of Europe's largest lake districts with over 180,000 lakes surrounded by forests.

finland.name: Nuuksio National Park
finland.description: A pristine wilderness close to Helsinki, perfect for hiking and wildlife watching.

finland.name: Suomenlinna Sea Fortress
finland.description: A UNESCO-listed sea fortress built on an archipelago, now a vibrant island community.

poland.name: Wawel Castle
poland.description: A fortified architectural complex in Kraków that served as the residence of Polish kings.

poland.name: Auschwitz-Birkenau
poland.description: A sobering UNESCO World Heritage Site and reminder of the Holocaust's atrocities.

poland.name: Warsaw Old Town
poland.description: The historic center of Warsaw, meticulously rebuilt after WWII destruction, now a UNESCO site.

poland.name: Wieliczka Salt Mine
poland.description: A UNESCO-listed mine with stunning underground chapels, lakes, and sculptures carved from salt.

poland.name: Białowieża Forest
poland.description: Europe's last primeval forest, home to the continent's largest population of European bison.

czech_republic.name: Prague Castle
czech_republic.description: The largest ancient castle in the world, dominating the city's skyline.

czech_republic.name: Charles Bridge
czech_republic.description: A historic 14th-century bridge adorned with Baroque statues spanning the Vltava River.

czech_republic.name: Old Town Square
czech_republic.description: A vibrant square with the famous Astronomical Clock and Gothic Týn Church.

czech_republic.name: Český Krumlov Castle
czech_republic.description: A UNESCO-listed castle complex in a stunning medieval town surrounded by the Vltava River.

czech_republic.name: Karlovy Vary
czech_republic.description: A famous spa town known for its hot springs, colonnades, and film festival.

hungary.name: Hungarian Parliament
hungary.description: One of Europe's oldest legislative buildings, a Neo-Gothic masterpiece on the Danube.

hungary.name: Buda Castle
hungary.description: A UNESCO-listed royal palace complex above the Danube with panoramic views over Pest.

hungary.name: Széchenyi Thermal Bath
hungary.description: The largest medicinal bath in Europe, a stunning Neo-Baroque complex with outdoor pools.

hungary.name: Fisherman's Bastion
hungary.description: A Neo-Romanesque terrace on the Buda side offering the best views of the city.

hungary.name: Lake Balaton
hungary.description: Central Europe's largest lake, known as the Hungarian Sea, perfect for summer holidays.

qatar.name: Museum of Islamic Art
qatar.description: A stunning I. M. Pei-designed museum showcasing 1,400 years of Islamic art.

qatar.name: Souq Waqif
qatar.description: A traditional market offering spices, handicrafts, and authentic Qatari culture.

qatar.name: The Pearl-Qatar
qatar.description: An artificial island with luxury residences, yacht marinas, and world-class dining.

qatar.name: Katara Cultural Village
qatar.description: A cultural complex featuring theaters, galleries, and traditional Qatari architecture.

qatar.name: Inland Sea (Khor Al Adaid)
qatar.description: A UNESCO-recognized natural reserve where the sea meets the desert in spectacular fashion.

jordan.name: Petra
jordan.description: The iconic rose-red city carved into sandstone cliffs, a UNESCO Wonder of the World.

jordan.name: Wadi Rum
jordan.description: A protected desert wilderness with dramatic red sand dunes and ancient rock inscriptions.

jordan.name: Dead Sea
jordan.description: The lowest point on Earth, where the extreme salt concentration allows effortless floating.

jordan.name: Jerash Ruins
jordan.description: One of the best-preserved Roman provincial cities in the world, with colonnaded streets.

jordan.name: Aqaba
jordan.description: Jordan's only coastal city on the Red Sea, a paradise for divers with vibrant coral reefs.

malaysia.name: Petronas Twin Towers
malaysia.description: The world's tallest twin towers, an iconic symbol of Malaysia's modern ambition.

malaysia.name: Batu Caves

malaysia.name: Langkawi

malaysia.name: Borneo Rainforest
malaysia.description: One of the world's oldest rainforests, home to orangutans, pygmy elephants, and proboscis monkeys.

malaysia.name: George Town
malaysia.description: A UNESCO-listed city famous for its street art, heritage architecture, and incredible food scene.

sri_lanka.name: Sigiriya Rock Fortress

sri_lanka.name: Temple of the Tooth

sri_lanka.name: Ella
sri_lanka.description: A hill country gem with stunning viewpoints, tea plantations, and the famous Nine Arch Bridge.

sri_lanka.name: Unawatuna Beach
sri_lanka.description: One of the world's best beaches, with a crescent bay, coral reefs, and beach restaurants.

sri_lanka.name: Yala National Park
sri_lanka.description: Sri Lanka's most visited park with the world's highest density of leopards and diverse wildlife.

new_zealand.name: Milford Sound
new_zealand.description: Often called the Eighth Wonder of the World, this fjord features towering peaks and cascading waterfalls.

new_zealand.name: Tongariro Alpine Crossing

new_zealand.name: Bay of Islands

new_zealand.name: Rotorua

mexico.description: A UNESCO-listed historic center with Aztec ruins, colonial architecture, and vibrant street life.

mexico.name: Tulum

argentina.name: Perito Moreno Glacier

argentina.name: Iguazu Falls

argentina.name: Buenos Aires
argentina.description: The 'Paris of South America', famed for tango, steak, and rich European-influenced architecture.

argentina.name: Torres del Paine
argentina.description: A national park featuring the dramatic Paine Massif and stunning Patagonian wilderness.

argentina.name: Mendoza Wine Region
argentina.description: The heart of Argentina's wine country set against the backdrop of the Andes Mountains.

chile.name: Easter Island
chile.description: Home to the mysterious moai statues, colossal figures carved by the Rapa Nui people.

chile.name: Atacama Desert
chile.description: The driest non-polar desert on Earth, with otherworldly landscapes like Moon Valley.

chile.name: Torres del Paine
chile.description: Iconic granite towers piercing the Patagonian sky above ancient glaciers and turquoise lakes.

chile.name: Valparaíso
chile.description: A bohemian port city with colourful hillside homes, street art, and a vibrant cultural scene.

chile.name: Chiloé Archipelago
chile.description: A mystical island group with palafito stilt houses, UNESCO-listed wooden churches, and penguins.

peru.name: Machu Picchu

peru.name: Lake Titicaca
peru.description: The world's highest navigable lake, home to the floating Uros reed islands.

peru.name: Nazca Lines
peru.description: Giant ancient geoglyphs etched into the desert, best seen from a small aircraft.

peru.name: Amazon Rainforest
peru.description: A remote Amazon city accessible only by air or river, gateway to pristine jungle adventures.

colombia.name: Cartagena Old City
colombia.description: A UNESCO-listed walled city with colourful colonial buildings, cobblestone streets, and bougainvillea.

colombia.name: Medellín
colombia.description: A city of innovation and culture, transformed into a global model of urban renewal.

colombia.name: Coffee Region (Eje Cafetero)

colombia.name: Tayrona National Park

panama.description: A UNESCO-listed historic district with colonial buildings and a lively café and restaurant scene.

panama.name: Bocas del Toro

panama.name: Pearl Islands
panama.description: A stunning archipelago of over 200 islands with pristine beaches and abundant marine life.

south_africa.name: Table Mountain

south_africa.name: Kruger National Park

south_africa.name: Cape Peninsula
south_africa.description: A dramatic peninsula with the Cape of Good Hope, penguin colonies at Boulders Beach.

south_africa.name: Garden Route

south_africa.name: Robben Island

morocco.name: Marrakech Medina
morocco.description: A UNESCO-listed maze of souqs, riads, and vibrant Jemaa el-Fna square of snake charmers.

morocco.name: Sahara Desert (Erg Chebbi)

morocco.name: Aït Benhaddou

ireland.name: Cliffs of Moher

indonesia.name: Borobudur Temple

indonesia.name: Raja Ampat

indonesia.name: Tanah Lot Temple

singapore.name: Gardens by the Bay
singapore.description: A futuristic nature park with towering Supertree structures and cloud forests.

singapore.name: Sentosa Island

singapore.description: A museum chronicling the lives of Chinatown's early Chinese immigrants.

philippines.name: Boracay White Beach
philippines.description: A world-famous 4-km stretch of powdery white sand and crystal-clear waters.

philippines.name: Banaue Rice Terraces
philippines.description: Ancient hand-carved rice terraces carved into the mountains 2,000 years ago.

philippines.name: Siargao Island
philippines.description: The surfing capital of the Philippines with pristine mangroves and lagoons.

india.name: Taj Mahal
india.description: An ivory-white marble mausoleum and one of the New Seven Wonders of the World.

india.name: Jaipur Pink City
india.description: A vibrant city known for its pink-hued buildings and majestic Hawa Mahal palace.

india.name: Kerala Backwaters

india.name: Varanasi Ghats

australia.name: Sydney Opera House
australia.description: An architectural masterpiece and UNESCO World Heritage Site on Sydney Harbour.

australia.name: Great Barrier Reef
australia.description: The world's largest coral reef system visible from outer space.

australia.name: Uluru
australia.description: A massive sandstone monolith sacred to Indigenous Australians.

australia.name: Great Ocean Road
australia.description: A scenic coastal drive featuring the Twelve Apostles rock formations.

australia.name: Bondi Beach

canada.name: Banff National Park
canada.description: Canada's oldest national park with turquoise lakes and towering Rocky Mountain peaks.

canada.name: Niagara Falls
canada.description: One of the most powerful waterfalls in the world straddling the US-Canada border.

canada.name: Old Montreal
canada.description: A historic neighborhood with cobblestone streets and stunning 17th-century architecture.

canada.name: Lake Louise
canada.description: A glacier-fed lake known for its stunning turquoise color surrounded by peaks.

canada.name: Vancouver

costa_rica.name: Arenal Volcano
costa_rica.description: An active volcano surrounded by hot springs, waterfalls, and lush rainforest.

costa_rica.name: Monteverde Cloud Forest
costa_rica.description: A mystical cloud forest reserve home to an extraordinary variety of wildlife.

costa_rica.name: Manuel Antonio
costa_rica.description: A stunning national park combining pristine beaches with tropical wildlife.

costa_rica.name: Nicoya Peninsula
costa_rica.description: A Blue Zone peninsula known for beautiful beaches and the longevity of its residents.

egypt.name: Pyramids of Giza

egypt.name: Valley of the Kings

egypt.name: Karnak Temple

switzerland.name: Matterhorn

switzerland.name: Jungfraujoch
switzerland.description: A saddle in the Bernese Alps, accessible by railway as the Top of Europe.

switzerland.name: Lake Geneva
switzerland.description: A crescent-shaped lake spanning the Swiss-French border with pristine shores.

switzerland.name: Lucerne Old Town
switzerland.description: A charming medieval city with a covered wooden bridge and lakeside promenade.

switzerland.name: Rhine Falls
switzerland.description: The most powerful waterfall in Europe situated on the High Rhine.
